message:
feat: add 85,434 contributions callout and badge

Add contributions badge (85,434 in past year) to header stats row.
Add prominent NOTE callout block explaining the contribution volume
is powered by 52+ AI agent subscriptions (~$12K/mo) and the Flywheel
tooling, with the vast majority landing since January 2026.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
